verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Side by side we stand Waiting God's command Worshipping the saving King Living by His grace And moving out in faith Jesus will see us through

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Meet me in Heaven We'll join hands together Meet me by the Saviours' side I'll meet you in Heaven We'll sing songs together Brothers and Sisters I'll be there

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Soldiers all are we To go where Jesus leads To fight the foe and we will overcome Heaven is our goal To save every soul Pray that we all will be there
